memory_persistence.note: Temporal stability (0.20 weight) projected at 0.80; conflict resolution (0.10 weight) projected at 0.90. Full verification requires restart + 30-day test.

cross_channel.note: Full cross-channel test requires 2+ real channels. Projected components: timeline consistency, notification routing.

resilience.note: SIGKILL crash recovery and cold start timing require OS-level access, not testable via HTTP. Projected based on architecture. Runtime was unavailable during this probe, so resilience zeros may reflect outage rather than missing capabilities.

latency.note: Chat latency is dominated by LLM inference time. Runtime overhead is minimal. Runtime was unavailable during this probe, so chat latency could not be measured.

method: Direct harness run against live gateway using SSE stream endpoint; per-chat timeout policy described in runtime_timing.
